source: MDN Web Docs and CSS Specifications

Layout.description: Properties that control the layout and positioning of elements

BoxModel.description: Properties related to the box model: width, height, margin, padding, border

FlexGridGap.description: Gap properties for flex and grid layouts

MotionPath.description: CSS Motion Path properties for animation along paths

Houdini.description: CSS Houdini properties for low-level rendering control
